ksa_text: Knowledge of complex data structures and types, including nested structures, array types, graph data structures, and their capabilities and applications within data systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-003 (Data Architecture/Knowledge) scores 0.404 composite (highest: NICE at 0.404). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Architecture, composite 0.404. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Architecture for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Architecture appears in ~35% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. Clinical data architecture (FHIR/HL7) relevant for integration-focused roles. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Architecture without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Data Architecture without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
